case_title: JASON PEELLE VS. TRIONFO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEELLE, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIONFO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CHIAROSCURO RESTAURANT $1,890.35 PRINCIPAL, $3.12 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,073.47, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEELLE, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT TRIONFO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CHIAROSCURO RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEELLE, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT TRIONFO, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CHIAROSCURO RESTAURANT
